project: US 30+ fat shred — vertical mobile ad

shots.motion_prompt: The man glances down at his midsection with a slight frown, then lifts his head and looks straight at the camera with quiet determination. Slow cinematic push-in.

shots.overlay: It's not your fault — it's your plan.
shots.motion_prompt: The man glances at the fitness watch on his wrist, takes a steadying breath, and gives a small confident nod to himself. Gentle handheld, shallow depth of field.
The man grips a kettlebell and performs powerful explosive kettlebell swings, core engaged, sweat forming on his brow. Slow push-in, low hero angle.
The man lifts a dumbbell in a strong, controlled bicep curl, muscles flexing, focused and intense. Tight medium shot, slight orbit.
The man wipes his forehead with the back of his hand, breathing hard, then breaks into a satisfied confident smile. Warm golden morning light, gentle handheld.
The man crosses his arms over his chest and gives a confident, reassuring nod toward the camera. Slow steady push-in, clean framing with space on the right.
